_comment: Learned patterns from real-world MCP repo scans. Loaded by MCPSecurityScanner at init.

code_patterns._note: eval() in MCP tool handler = code injection. Any LLM-supplied argument reaching eval is RCE. Discovered during modelcontextprotocol/servers review.
Dynamic require() with user-controlled input enables module injection.
Shell execution in MCP handler with user-controlled params = command injection.
Tool handler reads credential from process.env — all registered tools inherit this env scope. Ensure least-privilege env per tool.

SSRF optional-allowlist: domain check only fires when allowlist is non-empty. Empty allowlist (default) permits all URLs including RFC1918/metadata endpoints. Discovered: modelcontextprotocol/servers gzip-file-as-resource.ts scan 2026-02-27.
Cloud metadata endpoint hardcoded or reachable. SSRF to this endpoint leaks IAM credentials.

Playwright page.evaluate() called with LLM-controlled argument (args.*). Any MCP tool exposing evaluate with user-supplied script parameter has RCE. Discovered: executeautomation/mcp-playwright EvaluateTool interaction.ts:161.

MCP tool named playwright_evaluate exposes arbitrary JS execution to the LLM agent. Script parameter is fully LLM-controlled with no sandboxing. Discovered: executeautomation/mcp-playwright tools.ts. Fix: remove tool or add strict allowlist of permitted operations.

MCP tool schema exposes a 'script' parameter described as JavaScript to execute. This is an RCE vector — LLM agents can inject arbitrary code. Discovered: executeautomation/mcp-playwright tools.ts:202.

Playwright page.goto() called with LLM-controlled URL (args.*) and no domain allowlist. Enables navigation to internal services, file:// URIs, or cloud metadata endpoints. Discovered: executeautomation/mcp-playwright NavigationTool navigation.ts:31.

Playwright setInputFiles() with user-controlled filePath (args.*). Enables path traversal to read arbitrary local files. Discovered: executeautomation/mcp-playwright UploadFileTool interaction.ts:146.
MCP tool schema accepts filePath described as 'Absolute path' with no sandbox constraint. Allows LLM to target any filesystem location. Discovered: executeautomation/mcp-playwright tools.ts:191.

Playwright APIRequestContext HTTP method called with LLM-controlled URL (args.url) and no domain allowlist. All HTTP verbs (GET/POST/PUT/PATCH/DELETE) are vulnerable. Discovered: executeautomation/mcp-playwright requests.ts.

Playwright APIRequestContext created with LLM-controlled baseURL. All subsequent API calls inherit this base, enabling SSRF to internal services. Discovered: executeautomation/mcp-playwright toolHandler.ts:404.

Authentication token or credential logged to stdout via console.log. Log aggregators, CI output, and container log capture expose the secret in plaintext. Discovered: makenotion/notion-mcp-server start-server.ts:89 — auto-generated authToken printed verbatim.

Full process.env cloned and forwarded to child process or downstream agent. Grants the recipient all host secrets, not just the ones it needs. Discovered: ChromeDevTools/chrome-devtools-mcp eval_gemini.ts:111. Fix: use an explicit allowlist of required env keys.

Go log.Logf/Printf credential logging. Auto-generated auth Bearer token printed to stderr on SSE/streaming gateway startup. Captured by log aggregators, CI pipelines, container logging sidecars. Discovered: docker/mcp-gateway pkg/gateway/run.go:442. Fix: suppress token display or write to secured credential store.

Go exec.CommandContext with /bin/sh -c and dynamic argument. Interceptor system passes operator-supplied argument string to shell — any injection in the interceptor config path achieves RCE. Discovered: docker/mcp-gateway pkg/interceptors/interceptors.go:160. Fix: parse command + args separately, never pass to shell -c.

Go os.Environ() clones the full host environment and passes it to a child process or subprocess. Every credential on the host (AWS keys, GitHub tokens, API keys) is inherited. Discovered: docker/mcp-gateway pkg/mcp/stdio.go:41 (cmd.Env = c.env populated from os.Environ()). Fix: build an explicit env allowlist with only the keys the child process needs.

config_patterns._note: npx -y installs latest npm package without version pinning. If registry package is compromised, auto-installs malicious code. Discovered: pinecone-io/pinecone-claude-code-plugin scan 2026-02-27. Fix: pin version with @x.y.z suffix.
MCP HTTP transport declared without explicit auth field. Verify server-side auth is enforced even when not in config.
